mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_data (dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, dict_sort, css_class, list_class, is_default, status, create_by, create_time, deleted, remark) VALUES (#{dictType}, #{dictLabel}, #{dictValue}, #{dictSort}, #{cssClass}, #{listClass}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dict_data
dict_type = #{dictType}, dict_label = #{dictLabel}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, dict_sort = #{dictSort}, css_class = #{cssClass}, list_class = #{listClass}, is_default = #{isDefault}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY dict_sort ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND dict_value = #{dictValue} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY dict_sort ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dict_data WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND dict_value = #{dictValue} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0
